requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility for BESS Power Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: BESS电力电子设备电磁兼容
requirement_topic.zht: BESS電力電子設備電磁相容

summary.en: BESS power conversion systems, battery management electronics, controllers, communications modules, and auxiliary equipment may fall under Turkey's CE-aligned EMC framework when placed on the Turkish market. The EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU model requires equipment to meet essential EMC requirements, maintain technical documentation, and carry a Declaration of Conformity; Turkish implementation and applicable TS EN standards should be checked for the exact product configuration.
summary.zh: BESS功率变换系统、电池管理电子设备、控制器、通信模块及辅助设备在土耳其市场投放时，可能落入土耳其CE对应EMC框架。欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU模式要求设备满足基本EMC要求、保留技术文件并出具符合性声明；具体产品配置应核实土耳其实法规和适用TS EN标准。
summary.zht: BESS功率轉換系統、電池管理電子設備、控制器、通訊模組及輔助設備在土耳其市場投放時，可能落入土耳其CE對應EMC框架。歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU模式要求設備滿足基本EMC要求、保留技術文件並出具符合性聲明；具體產品配置應核實土耳其實施法規和適用TS EN標準。

standards_or_laws: Turkey CE-aligned EMC rules for in-scope equipment
Applicable TS EN IEC 61000-series EMC standards by equipment type and environment

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 17799 generic EMC standards and GB 4824 for radio disturbance characteristics of industrial, scientific, and medical equipment, together with product-specific standards for converters, controls, and communication equipment. Chinese EMC evidence may help technical comparison but is not automatically a Turkish EMC technical file or Declaration of Conformity.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB/T 17799电磁兼容通用标准和GB 4824工业、科学和医疗设备无线电骚扰特性限值，并结合变流器、控制和通信设备的产品特定标准。中国EMC证据可支持技术对照，但不会自动成为土耳其EMC技术文件或符合性声明。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB/T 17799電磁相容通用標準和GB 4824工業、科學和醫療設備無線電騷擾特性限值，並結合變流器、控制和通訊設備的產品特定標準。中國EMC證據可支持技術對照，但不會自動成為土耳其EMC技術文件或符合性聲明。

standards_or_laws: Product-specific China EMC standards for BESS subsystems

gap.en: Exporters should classify the BESS as a fixed installation, apparatus, or set of apparatus for EMC purposes, identify applicable TS EN IEC 61000 limits and immunity tests, document installation conditions, and ensure that PCS, BMS, communication gateways, and auxiliaries are covered by the Turkey-facing Declaration of Conformity.
gap.zh: 出口商应按EMC目的将BESS归类为固定安装、设备或设备组合，识别适用TS EN IEC 61000限值和抗扰度测试，记录安装条件，并确保PCS、BMS、通信网关和辅助设备均纳入面向土耳其的符合性声明。
gap.zht: 出口商應按EMC目的將BESS歸類為固定安裝、設備或設備組合，識別適用TS EN IEC 61000限值和抗擾度測試，記錄安裝條件，並確保PCS、BMS、通訊閘道和輔助設備均納入面向土耳其的符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for equipment in scope of Turkish CE-aligned EMC rules; exact standards and conformity route depend on product configuration and installation use
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or product-specific for in-scope China EMC rules; GB/T standards may be recommended but required by procurement or grid acceptance

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Parliament and Council; Turkish Standards Institution (TSE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EMC reports can be useful engineering evidence, but Turkish CE-aligned EMC compliance requires the right equipment classification, TS EN test basis, technical documentation, and Declaration of Conformity for the Turkey-supplied configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国EMC报告可作为有用工程证据，但土耳其CE对应EMC合规需要针对供土耳其配置完成正确设备分类、TS EN测试依据、技术文件和符合性声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國EMC報告可作為有用工程證據，但土耳其CE對應EMC合規需要針對供土耳其配置完成正確設備分類、TS EN測試依據、技術文件和符合性聲明。
